heading: Omitted
label: 1182 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which provided for judgment funds to be divided equally between the Cherokee Delawares and the Delaware Tribe, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 90–508, § 282 Stat. 861Sept. 21, 1968
